languages.text: "Грамотный подход. Чем больше бюрократических процедур предшествует казни, тем большее пространство для маневра остается подсудимому. Подобная эффективность впечатляет".

traits.locale_text: "Грамотный подход. Чем больше бюрократических процедур предшествует казни, тем большее пространство для маневра остается подсудимому. Подобная эффективность впечатляет".
traits.speaker: SolomorneCompanion

traits.locale_text: Драфт: говорит, что в целом подход разделяет — суд на месте и никаких проволочек

languages.text: "A prudent approach. The more bureaucratic procedures that precede an execution, the greater the latitude for manoeuvring afforded to the accused. Such efficiency is impressive."
languages.original_text: "Грамотный подход. Чем больше бюрократических процедур предшествует казни, тем большее пространство для маневра остается подсудимому. Подобная эффективность впечатляет".

traits.locale_text: "A prudent approach. The more bureaucratic procedures precede an execution, the greater the latitude for manoeuvre afforded to the accused. Such efficiency is impressive."

"A prudent approach. The more bureaucratic procedures that precede an execution, the greater the latitude for manoeuvring afforded to the accused. Such efficiency is impressive."

languages.text: «Es un enfoque prudente. Cuantos más procesos burocráticos preceden a una ejecución, más margen de maniobra tiene el acusado. Es una eficacia impresionante».
languages.original_text: "A prudent approach. The more bureaucratic procedures that precede an execution, the greater the latitude for manoeuvring afforded to the accused. Such efficiency is impressive."

traits.locale_text: «Es un enfoque prudente. Cuantos más procesos burocráticos preceden a una ejecución, más margen de maniobra tiene el acusado. Es una eficacia impresionante».

languages.text: “审慎之法。一场处决，前置的官僚程序越是繁复，遭指控者所能周旋的余地便越大。如此效率，着实令人印象深刻。”
languages.original_text: "A prudent approach. The more bureaucratic procedures that precede an execution, the greater the latitude for manoeuvring afforded to the accused. Such efficiency is impressive."

traits.locale_text: “审慎之法。一场处决，前置的官僚程序越是繁复，遭指控者所能周旋的余地便越大。如此效率，着实令人印象深刻。”

languages.text: « Une approche prudente. Plus les procédures précédant une exécution sont bureaucratiques, plus l'accusé dispose de latitude pour y échapper. J'admire cette efficacité. »
languages.original_text: "A prudent approach. The more bureaucratic procedures that precede an execution, the greater the latitude for manoeuvring afforded to the accused. Such efficiency is impressive."

traits.locale_text: « Une approche prudente. Plus les procédures précédant une exécution sont bureaucratiques, plus l'accusé dispose de latitude pour y échapper. J'admire cette efficacité. »

languages.text: "İhtiyatlı bir yaklaşım. İnfazdan önceki bürokratik prosedürler ne kadar çok olursa sanığa o kadar fazla manevra alanı sağlanır. Böylesi bir verimlilik etkileyici."
languages.original_text: "A prudent approach. The more bureaucratic procedures that precede an execution, the greater the latitude for manoeuvring afforded to the accused. Such efficiency is impressive."

traits.locale_text: "İhtiyatlı bir yaklaşım. İnfazdan önceki bürokratik prosedürler ne kadar çok olursa sanığa o kadar fazla manevra alanı sağlanır. Böylesi bir verimlilik etkileyici."

languages.text: "Ein vernünftiger Ansatz. Je mehr bürokratische Prozesse einer Exekution vorausgehen, desto größer ist der Spielraum des Angeklagten, den Kopf aus der Schlinge zu ziehen. Eine solche Effizienz ist beeindruckend."
languages.original_text: "A prudent approach. The more bureaucratic procedures that precede an execution, the greater the latitude for manoeuvring afforded to the accused. Such efficiency is impressive."

traits.locale_text: "Ein vernünftiger Ansatz. Je mehr bürokratische Prozesse einer Exekution vorausgehen, desto größer ist der Spielraum des Angeklagten, den Kopf aus der Schlinge zu ziehen. Eine solche Effizienz ist beeindruckend."

languages.text: 「慎重なアプローチ死刑執行に先立つ官僚的な手続きが多ければ多いほど、被告人に与えられる自由裁量は大きくなる。このような効率性は印象的だ。
languages.original_text: "A prudent approach. The more bureaucratic procedures that precede an execution, the greater the latitude for manoeuvring afforded to the accused. Such efficiency is impressive."
